⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t = (x - 1) * exp x + 1

proof:
have h : ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t = (x - 1) * exp x + 1 := by
    have h1 : ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t = ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t := rfl
    -- Use the fundamental theorem of calculus to evaluate the integral
    -- We know the antiderivative of t * exp t is (t - 1) * exp t
    have h2 : (∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t) = (x - 1) * exp x + 1 := by
      have h3 : ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t = (x - 1) * exp x + 1 := by
        -- Use the antiderivative (t - 1) * exp t to compute the definite integral
        have h4 : ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t = (x - 1) * exp x + 1 := by
          -- Verify that the derivative of (t - 1) * exp t is t * exp t
          -- and use the fundamental theorem of calculus
          have h5 : (∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t) = ((x - 1) * exp x) - ((0 - 1) * exp 0) := by
            -- Use the fundamental theorem of calculus
            have h6 : ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t = ((x - 1) * exp x) - ((0 - 1) * exp 0) := by
              -- Compute the integral using the antiderivative
              have h7 : (∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..x, t * exp t) = ((x - 1) * exp x) - ((0 - 1) * exp 0) := by
                -- Prove that the derivative of (t - 1) * exp t is t * exp t
                -- and use the fundamental theorem of calculus
                rw [intervalIntegral.integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (fun x _ => by
                  -- Prove that the derivative of (x - 1) * exp x is x * exp x
                  have h8 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (x - 1) * exp x) ((x - 1) * exp x + exp x) x := by
                    have h9 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (x - 1 : ℝ)) 1 x := by
                      simpa using (hasDerivAt_id x).sub_const (1 : ℝ)
                    have h10 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => exp x) (exp x) x := by
                      exact Real.hasDerivAt_exp x
                    have h11 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (x - 1 : ℝ) * exp x) ((1 : ℝ) * exp x + (x - 1 : ℝ) * exp x) x := by
                      convert h9.mul h10 using 1 <;> ring_nf <;>
                        field_simp [Real.differentiableAt_exp] <;> ring
                    convert h11 using 1 <;> ring_nf <;>
                      field_simp [Real.differentiableAt_exp] <;> ring
                  have h12 : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => (x - 1) * exp x) ((x - 1) * exp x + exp x) x := by
                    exact h8
                  convert h12 using 1 <;>
                    ring_nf <;>
                    field_simp [Real.differentiableAt_exp] <;>
                    ring
                  ) (by
                    -- Prove that (t - 1) * exp t is continuous on [0, x]
                    apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
                    continuity
                  )]
                <;>
                  simp [exp_zero]
                <;>
                  ring_nf
                <;>
                  field_simp [Real.differentiableAt_exp]
                <;>
                  ring
              exact h7
            exact h6
          rw [h5]
          -- Simplify the expression to get the final result
          <;> simp [exp_zero]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp [Real.differentiableAt_exp]
          <;> ring
        exact h4
      exact h3
    rw [h2]
  rw [h]
